unique_diff_within_at.eq_deriv

One-dimensional derivatives #

This file defines the derivative of a function f : 𝕜 → F where 𝕜 is a normed field and F is a normed space over this field. The derivative of such a function f at a point x is given by an element f' : F.

The theory is developed analogously to the Fréchet derivatives. We first introduce predicates defined in terms of the corresponding predicates for Fréchet derivatives:

  • has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L states that the function f has the derivative f' at the point x as x goes along the filter L.

  • has_deriv_within_at f f' s x states that the function f has the derivative f' at the point x within the subset s.

  • has_deriv_at f f' x states that the function f has the derivative f' at the point x.

  • has_strict_deriv_at f f' x states that the function f has the derivative f' at the point x in the sense of strict differentiability, i.e., f y - f z = (y - z) • f' + o (y - z) as y, z → x.

For the last two notions we also define a functional version:

  • deriv_within f s x is a derivative of f at x within s. If the derivative does not exist, then deriv_within f s x equals zero.

  • deriv f x is a derivative of f at x. If the derivative does not exist, then deriv f x equals zero.

The theorems fderiv_within_deriv_within and fderiv_deriv show that the one-dimensional derivatives coincide with the general Fréchet derivatives.

We also show the existence and compute the derivatives of:

  • constants
  • the identity function
  • linear maps
  • addition
  • sum of finitely many functions
  • negation
  • subtraction
  • multiplication
  • inverse x → x⁻¹
  • multiplication of two functions in 𝕜 → 𝕜
  • multiplication of a function in 𝕜 → 𝕜 and of a function in 𝕜 → E
  • composition of a function in 𝕜 → F with a function in 𝕜 → 𝕜
  • composition of a function in F → E with a function in 𝕜 → F
  • inverse function (assuming that it exists; the inverse function theorem is in inverse.lean)
  • division
  • polynomials

For most binary operations we also define const_op and op_const theorems for the cases when the first or second argument is a constant. This makes writing chains of has_deriv_at's easier, and they more frequently lead to the desired result.

We set up the simplifier so that it can compute the derivative of simple functions. For instance,

example (x : ℝ) : deriv (λ x, cos (sin x) * exp x) x = (cos(sin(x))-sin(sin(x))*cos(x))*exp(x) :=
by { simp, ring }

Implementation notes #

Most of the theorems are direct restatements of the corresponding theorems for Fréchet derivatives.

The strategy to construct simp lemmas that give the simplifier the possibility to compute derivatives is the same as the one for differentiability statements, as explained in fderiv.lean. See the explanations there.

source
def has_deriv_at_filter {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] (f : 𝕜 → F) (f' : F) (x : 𝕜) (L : filter 𝕜) :
Prop

f has the derivative f' at the point x as x goes along the filter L.

That is, f x' = f x + (x' - x) • f' + o(x' - x) where x' converges along the filter L.

Equations
  • has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L = has_fderiv_at_filter f (1.smul_right f') x L
source
def has_deriv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] (f : 𝕜 → F) (f' : F) (s : set 𝕜) (x : 𝕜) :
Prop

f has the derivative f' at the point x within the subset s.

That is, f x' = f x + (x' - x) • f' + o(x' - x) where x' converges to x inside s.

Equations
  • has_deriv_within_at f f' s x = has_deriv_at_filter f f' x (𝓝[s] x)
source
def has_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] (f : 𝕜 → F) (f' : F) (x : 𝕜) :
Prop

f has the derivative f' at the point x.

That is, f x' = f x + (x' - x) • f' + o(x' - x) where x' converges to x.

Equations
  • has_deriv_at f f' x = has_deriv_at_filter f f' x (𝓝 x)
source
def has_strict_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] (f : 𝕜 → F) (f' : F) (x : 𝕜) :
Prop

f has the derivative f' at the point x in the sense of strict differentiability.

That is, f y - f z = (y - z) • f' + o(y - z) as y, z → x.

Equations
  • has_strict_deriv_at f f' x = has_strict_fderiv_at f (1.smul_right f') x
source
def deriv_within {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] (f : 𝕜 → F) (s : set 𝕜) (x : 𝕜) :
F

Derivative of f at the point x within the set s, if it exists. Zero otherwise.

If the derivative exists (i.e., ∃ f', has_deriv_within_at f f' s x), then f x' = f x + (x' - x) • deriv_within f s x + o(x' - x) where x' converges to x inside s.

Equations
  • deriv_within f s x = ⇑(fderiv_within 𝕜 f s x) 1
source
def deriv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] (f : 𝕜 → F) (x : 𝕜) :
F

Derivative of f at the point x, if it exists. Zero otherwise.

If the derivative exists (i.e., ∃ f', has_deriv_at f f' x), then f x' = f x + (x' - x) • deriv f x + o(x' - x) where x' converges to x.

Equations
  • deriv f x = ⇑(fderiv 𝕜 f x) 1
source
theorem has_fderiv_at_filter_iff_has_deriv_at_filter {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} {f' : 𝕜 →L[𝕜] F} :
has_fderiv_at_filter f f' x L ↔ has_deriv_at_filter f (⇑f' 1) x L

Expressing has_fderiv_at_filter f f' x L in terms of has_deriv_at_filter

source
theorem has_fderiv_at_filter.has_deriv_at_filter {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} {f' : 𝕜 →L[𝕜] F} :
has_fderiv_at_filter f f' x L → has_deriv_at_filter f (⇑f' 1) x L
source
theorem has_fderiv_within_at_iff_has_deriv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {f' : 𝕜 →L[𝕜] F} :
has_fderiv_within_at f f' s x ↔ has_deriv_within_at f (⇑f' 1) s x

Expressing has_fderiv_within_at f f' s x in terms of has_deriv_within_at

source
theorem has_deriv_within_at_iff_has_fderiv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {f' : F} :
has_deriv_within_at f f' s x ↔ has_fderiv_within_at f (1.smul_right f') s x

Expressing has_deriv_within_at f f' s x in terms of has_fderiv_within_at

source
theorem has_fderiv_within_at.has_deriv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {f' : 𝕜 →L[𝕜] F} :
has_fderiv_within_at f f' s x → has_deriv_within_at f (⇑f' 1) s x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.has_fderiv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {f' : F} :
has_deriv_within_at f f' s x → has_fderiv_within_at f (1.smul_right f') s x
source
theorem has_fderiv_at_iff_has_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {f' : 𝕜 →L[𝕜] F} :
has_fderiv_at f f' x ↔ has_deriv_at f (⇑f' 1) x

Expressing has_fderiv_at f f' x in terms of has_deriv_at

source
theorem has_fderiv_at.has_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {f' : 𝕜 →L[𝕜] F} :
has_fderiv_at f f' x → has_deriv_at f (⇑f' 1) x
source
theorem has_strict_fderiv_at_iff_has_strict_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {f' : 𝕜 →L[𝕜] F} :
has_strict_fderiv_at f f' x ↔ has_strict_deriv_at f (⇑f' 1) x
source
theorem has_strict_fderiv_at.has_strict_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {f' : 𝕜 →L[𝕜] F} :
has_strict_fderiv_at f f' x → has_strict_deriv_at f (⇑f' 1) x
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at_iff_has_strict_fderiv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} :
has_strict_deriv_at f f' x ↔ has_strict_fderiv_at f (1.smul_right f') x
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.has_strict_fderiv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} :
has_strict_deriv_at f f' x → has_strict_fderiv_at f (1.smul_right f') x

Alias of has_strict_deriv_at_iff_has_strict_fderiv_at.

source
theorem has_deriv_at_iff_has_fderiv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {f' : F} :
has_deriv_at f f' x ↔ has_fderiv_at f (1.smul_right f') x

Expressing has_deriv_at f f' x in terms of has_fderiv_at

source
theorem has_deriv_at.has_fderiv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {f' : F} :
has_deriv_at f f' x → has_fderiv_at f (1.smul_right f') x

Alias of has_deriv_at_iff_has_fderiv_at.

source
theorem deriv_within_zero_of_not_differentiable_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (h : ¬differentiable_within_at 𝕜 f s x) :
deriv_within f s x = 0
source
theorem deriv_zero_of_not_differentiable_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} (h : ¬differentiable_at 𝕜 f x) :
deriv f x = 0
source
theorem unique_diff_within_at.eq_deriv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' f₁' : F} {x : 𝕜} (s : set 𝕜) (H : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (h : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (h₁ : has_deriv_within_at f f₁' s x) :
f' = f₁'
source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter_iff_tendsto {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} :
has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L ↔ filter.tendsto (λ (x' : 𝕜), ∥x' - x∥⁻¹ * ∥f x' - f x - (x' - x) • f'∥) L (𝓝 0)
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at_iff_tendsto {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} :
has_deriv_within_at f f' s x ↔ filter.tendsto (λ (x' : 𝕜), ∥x' - x∥⁻¹ * ∥f x' - f x - (x' - x) • f'∥) (𝓝[s] x) (𝓝 0)
source
theorem has_deriv_at_iff_tendsto {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} :
has_deriv_at f f' x ↔ filter.tendsto (λ (x' : 𝕜), ∥x' - x∥⁻¹ * ∥f x' - f x - (x' - x) • f'∥) (𝓝 x) (𝓝 0)
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.has_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} (h : has_strict_deriv_at f f' x) :
has_deriv_at f f' x
source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter_iff_tendsto_slope {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} :
has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L ↔ filter.tendsto (λ (y : 𝕜), (y - x)⁻¹ • (f y - f x)) (L ⊓ 𝓟 {x}ᶜ) (𝓝 f')

If the domain has dimension one, then Fréchet derivative is equivalent to the classical definition with a limit. In this version we have to take the limit along the subset -{x}, because for y=x the slope equals zero due to the convention 0⁻¹=0.

source
theorem has_deriv_within_at_iff_tendsto_slope {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} :
has_deriv_within_at f f' s x ↔ filter.tendsto (λ (y : 𝕜), (y - x)⁻¹ • (f y - f x)) (𝓝[s \ {x}] x) (𝓝 f')
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at_iff_tendsto_slope' {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hs : x ∉ s) :
has_deriv_within_at f f' s x ↔ filter.tendsto (λ (y : 𝕜), (y - x)⁻¹ • (f y - f x)) (𝓝[s] x) (𝓝 f')
source
theorem has_deriv_at_iff_tendsto_slope {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} :
has_deriv_at f f' x ↔ filter.tendsto (λ (y : 𝕜), (y - x)⁻¹ • (f y - f x)) (𝓝[{x}ᶜ] x) (𝓝 f')
source
@[simp]
theorem has_deriv_within_at_diff_singleton {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} :
has_deriv_within_at f f' (s \ {x}) x ↔ has_deriv_within_at f f' s x
source
@[simp]
theorem has_deriv_within_at_Ioi_iff_Ici {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} [partial_order 𝕜] :
has_deriv_within_at f f' (set.Ioi x) x ↔ has_deriv_within_at f f' (set.Ici x) x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.Ioi_of_Ici {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} [partial_order 𝕜] :
has_deriv_within_at f f' (set.Ici x) x → has_deriv_within_at f f' (set.Ioi x) x

Alias of has_deriv_within_at_Ioi_iff_Ici.

source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.Ici_of_Ioi {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} [partial_order 𝕜] :
has_deriv_within_at f f' (set.Ioi x) x → has_deriv_within_at f f' (set.Ici x) x

Alias of has_deriv_within_at_Ioi_iff_Ici.

source
@[simp]
theorem has_deriv_within_at_Iio_iff_Iic {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} [partial_order 𝕜] :
has_deriv_within_at f f' (set.Iio x) x ↔ has_deriv_within_at f f' (set.Iic x) x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.Iic_of_Iio {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} [partial_order 𝕜] :
has_deriv_within_at f f' (set.Iio x) x → has_deriv_within_at f f' (set.Iic x) x

Alias of has_deriv_within_at_Iio_iff_Iic.

source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.Iio_of_Iic {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} [partial_order 𝕜] :
has_deriv_within_at f f' (set.Iic x) x → has_deriv_within_at f f' (set.Iio x) x

Alias of has_deriv_within_at_Iio_iff_Iic.

source
theorem has_deriv_at_iff_is_o_nhds_zero {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} :
has_deriv_at f f' x ↔ asymptotics.is_o (λ (h : 𝕜), f (x + h) - f x - h • f') (λ (h : 𝕜), h) (𝓝 0)
source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.mono {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L₁ L₂ : filter 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L₂) (hst : L₁ ≤ L₂) :
has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L₁
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.mono {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s t : set 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_within_at f f' t x) (hst : s ⊆ t) :
has_deriv_within_at f f' s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.has_deriv_at_filter {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_at f f' x) (hL : L ≤ 𝓝 x) :
has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L
source
theorem has_deriv_at.has_deriv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_at f f' x) :
has_deriv_within_at f f' s x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.differentiable_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) :
differentiable_within_at 𝕜 f s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.differentiable_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_at f f' x) :
differentiable_at 𝕜 f x
source
@[simp]
theorem has_deriv_within_at_univ {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} :
has_deriv_within_at f f' set.univ x ↔ has_deriv_at f f' x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.unique {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f₀' f₁' : F} {x : 𝕜} (h₀ : has_deriv_at f f₀' x) (h₁ : has_deriv_at f f₁' x) :
f₀' = f₁'
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at_inter' {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s t : set 𝕜} (h : t ∈ 𝓝[s] x) :
has_deriv_within_at f f' (s ∩ t) x ↔ has_deriv_within_at f f' s x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at_inter {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s t : set 𝕜} (h : t ∈ 𝓝 x) :
has_deriv_within_at f f' (s ∩ t) x ↔ has_deriv_within_at f f' s x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.union {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s t : set 𝕜} (hs : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (ht : has_deriv_within_at f f' t x) :
has_deriv_within_at f f' (s ∪ t) x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.nhds_within {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s t : set 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (ht : s ∈ 𝓝[t] x) :
has_deriv_within_at f f' t x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.has_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (hs : s ∈ 𝓝 x) :
has_deriv_at f f' x
source
theorem differentiable_within_at.has_deriv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (h : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 f s x) :
has_deriv_within_at f (deriv_within f s x) s x
source
theorem differentiable_at.has_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} (h : differentiable_at 𝕜 f x) :
has_deriv_at f (deriv f x) x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.deriv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_at f f' x) :
deriv f x = f'
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.deriv_within {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within f s x = f'
source
theorem fderiv_within_deriv_within {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} :
⇑(fderiv_within 𝕜 f s x) 1 = deriv_within f s x
source
theorem deriv_within_fderiv_within {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} :
1.smul_right (deriv_within f s x) = fderiv_within 𝕜 f s x
source
theorem fderiv_deriv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} :
⇑(fderiv 𝕜 f x) 1 = deriv f x
source
theorem deriv_fderiv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} :
1.smul_right (deriv f x) = fderiv 𝕜 f x
source
theorem differentiable_at.deriv_within {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (h : differentiable_at 𝕜 f x) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within f s x = deriv f x
source
theorem deriv_within_subset {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s t : set 𝕜} (st : s ⊆ t) (ht : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (h : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 f t x) :
deriv_within f s x = deriv_within f t x
source
@[simp]
theorem deriv_within_univ {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} :
deriv_within f set.univ = deriv f
source
theorem deriv_within_inter {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s t : set 𝕜} (ht : t ∈ 𝓝 x) (hs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within f (s ∩ t) x = deriv_within f s x
source
theorem deriv_within_of_open {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hs : is_open s) (hx : x ∈ s) :
deriv_within f s x = deriv f x

Congruence properties of derivatives #

source
theorem filter.eventually_eq.has_deriv_at_filter_iff {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f₀ f₁ : 𝕜 → F} {f₀' f₁' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} (h₀ : f₀ =ᶠ[L] f₁) (hx : f₀ x = f₁ x) (h₁ : f₀' = f₁') :
has_deriv_at_filter f₀ f₀' x L ↔ has_deriv_at_filter f₁ f₁' x L
source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.congr_of_eventually_eq {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f f₁ : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L) (hL : f₁ =ᶠ[L] f) (hx : f₁ x = f x) :
has_deriv_at_filter f₁ f' x L
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.congr_mono {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f f₁ : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s t : set 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (ht : ∀ (x : 𝕜), x ∈ t → f₁ x = f x) (hx : f₁ x = f x) (h₁ : t ⊆ s) :
has_deriv_within_at f₁ f' t x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.congr {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f f₁ : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (hs : ∀ (x : 𝕜), x ∈ s → f₁ x = f x) (hx : f₁ x = f x) :
has_deriv_within_at f₁ f' s x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.congr_of_eventually_eq {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f f₁ : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (h₁ : f₁ =ᶠ[𝓝[s] x] f) (hx : f₁ x = f x) :
has_deriv_within_at f₁ f' s x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.congr_of_eventually_eq_of_mem {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f f₁ : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (h₁ : f₁ =ᶠ[𝓝[s] x] f) (hx : x ∈ s) :
has_deriv_within_at f₁ f' s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.congr_of_eventually_eq {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f f₁ : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_at f f' x) (h₁ : f₁ =ᶠ[𝓝 x] f) :
has_deriv_at f₁ f' x
source
theorem filter.eventually_eq.deriv_within_eq {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f f₁ : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (hL : f₁ =ᶠ[𝓝[s] x] f) (hx : f₁ x = f x) :
deriv_within f₁ s x = deriv_within f s x
source
theorem deriv_within_congr {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f f₁ : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (hL : ∀ (y : 𝕜), y ∈ s → f₁ y = f y) (hx : f₁ x = f x) :
deriv_within f₁ s x = deriv_within f s x
source
theorem filter.eventually_eq.deriv_eq {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f f₁ : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} (hL : f₁ =ᶠ[𝓝 x] f) :
deriv f₁ x = deriv f x

Derivative of the identity #

source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter_id {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) (L : filter 𝕜) :
has_deriv_at_filter id 1 x L
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at_id {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) (s : set 𝕜) :
has_deriv_within_at id 1 s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at_id {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) :
has_deriv_at id 1 x
source
theorem has_deriv_at_id' {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) :
has_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), x) 1 x
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at_id {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) :
has_strict_deriv_at id 1 x
source
theorem deriv_id {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) :
deriv id x = 1
source
@[simp]
theorem deriv_id' {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] :
deriv id = λ (_x : 𝕜), 1
source
@[simp]
theorem deriv_id'' {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) :
deriv (λ (x : 𝕜), x) x = 1
source
theorem deriv_within_id {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) (s : set 𝕜) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within id s x = 1

Derivative of constant functions #

source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] (x : 𝕜) (L : filter 𝕜) (c : F) :
has_deriv_at_filter (λ (x : 𝕜), c) 0 x L
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] (x : 𝕜) (c : F) :
has_strict_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), c) 0 x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] (x : 𝕜) (s : set 𝕜) (c : F) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (x : 𝕜), c) 0 s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] (x : 𝕜) (c : F) :
has_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), c) 0 x
source
theorem deriv_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] (x : 𝕜) (c : F) :
deriv (λ (x : 𝕜), c) x = 0
source
@[simp]
theorem deriv_const' {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] (c : F) :
deriv (λ (x : 𝕜), c) = λ (x : 𝕜), 0
source
theorem deriv_within_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] (x : 𝕜) (s : set 𝕜) (c : F) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within (λ (x : 𝕜), c) s x = 0

Derivative of continuous linear maps #

source
theorem continuous_linear_map.has_deriv_at_filter {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} (e : 𝕜 →L[𝕜] F) :
has_deriv_at_filter ⇑e (⇑e 1) x L
source
theorem continuous_linear_map.has_strict_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} (e : 𝕜 →L[𝕜] F) :
has_strict_deriv_at ⇑e (⇑e 1) x
source
theorem continuous_linear_map.has_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} (e : 𝕜 →L[𝕜] F) :
has_deriv_at ⇑e (⇑e 1) x
source
theorem continuous_linear_map.has_deriv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (e : 𝕜 →L[𝕜] F) :
has_deriv_within_at ⇑e (⇑e 1) s x
source
@[simp]
theorem continuous_linear_map.deriv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} (e : 𝕜 →L[𝕜] F) :
deriv ⇑e x = ⇑e 1
source
theorem continuous_linear_map.deriv_within {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (e : 𝕜 →L[𝕜] F) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within ⇑e s x = ⇑e 1

Derivative of bundled linear maps #

source
theorem linear_map.has_deriv_at_filter {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} (e : 𝕜 →ₗ[𝕜] F) :
has_deriv_at_filter ⇑e (⇑e 1) x L
source
theorem linear_map.has_strict_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} (e : 𝕜 →ₗ[𝕜] F) :
has_strict_deriv_at ⇑e (⇑e 1) x
source
theorem linear_map.has_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} (e : 𝕜 →ₗ[𝕜] F) :
has_deriv_at ⇑e (⇑e 1) x
source
theorem linear_map.has_deriv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (e : 𝕜 →ₗ[𝕜] F) :
has_deriv_within_at ⇑e (⇑e 1) s x
source
@[simp]
theorem linear_map.deriv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} (e : 𝕜 →ₗ[𝕜] F) :
deriv ⇑e x = ⇑e 1
source
theorem linear_map.deriv_within {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (e : 𝕜 →ₗ[𝕜] F) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within ⇑e s x = ⇑e 1
source
theorem has_fpower_series_at.has_strict_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {p : formal_multilinear_series 𝕜 𝕜 F} (h : has_fpower_series_at f p x) :
has_strict_deriv_at f (⇑(p 1) (λ (_x : fin 1), 1)) x
source
theorem has_fpower_series_at.has_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {p : formal_multilinear_series 𝕜 𝕜 F} (h : has_fpower_series_at f p x) :
has_deriv_at f (⇑(p 1) (λ (_x : fin 1), 1)) x
source
theorem has_fpower_series_at.deriv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {p : formal_multilinear_series 𝕜 𝕜 F} (h : has_fpower_series_at f p x) :
deriv f x = ⇑(p 1) (λ (_x : fin 1), 1)

Derivative of the sum of two functions #

source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.add {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f g : 𝕜 → F} {f' g' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L) (hg : has_deriv_at_filter g g' x L) :
has_deriv_at_filter (λ (y : 𝕜), f y + g y) (f' + g') x L
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.add {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f g : 𝕜 → F} {f' g' : F} {x : 𝕜} (hf : has_strict_deriv_at f f' x) (hg : has_strict_deriv_at g g' x) :
has_strict_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), f y + g y) (f' + g') x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.add {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f g : 𝕜 → F} {f' g' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (hg : has_deriv_within_at g g' s x) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (y : 𝕜), f y + g y) (f' + g') s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.add {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f g : 𝕜 → F} {f' g' : F} {x : 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_at f f' x) (hg : has_deriv_at g g' x) :
has_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), f x + g x) (f' + g') x
source
theorem deriv_within_add {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f g : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (hf : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 f s x) (hg : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 g s x) :
deriv_within (λ (y : 𝕜), f y + g y) s x = deriv_within f s x + deriv_within g s x
source
@[simp]
theorem deriv_add {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f g : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} (hf : differentiable_at 𝕜 f x) (hg : differentiable_at 𝕜 g x) :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), f y + g y) x = deriv f x + deriv g x
source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.add_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L) (c : F) :
has_deriv_at_filter (λ (y : 𝕜), f y + c) f' x L
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.add_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (c : F) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (y : 𝕜), f y + c) f' s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.add_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_at f f' x) (c : F) :
has_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), f x + c) f' x
source
theorem deriv_within_add_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (c : F) :
deriv_within (λ (y : 𝕜), f y + c) s x = deriv_within f s x
source
theorem deriv_add_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} (c : F) :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), f y + c) x = deriv f x
source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.const_add {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} (c : F) (hf : has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L) :
has_deriv_at_filter (λ (y : 𝕜), c + f y) f' x L
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.const_add {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (c : F) (hf : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (y : 𝕜), c + f y) f' s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.const_add {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} (c : F) (hf : has_deriv_at f f' x) :
has_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), c + f x) f' x
source
theorem deriv_within_const_add {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (c : F) :
deriv_within (λ (y : 𝕜), c + f y) s x = deriv_within f s x
source
theorem deriv_const_add {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} (c : F) :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), c + f y) x = deriv f x

Derivative of a finite sum of functions #

source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.sum {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} {ι : Type u_1} {u : finset ι} {A : ι → 𝕜 → F} {A' : ι → F} (h : ∀ (i : ι), i ∈ u → has_deriv_at_filter (A i) (A' i) x L) :
has_deriv_at_filter (λ (y : 𝕜), ∑ (i : ι) in u, A i y) (∑ (i : ι) in u, A' i) x L
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.sum {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {ι : Type u_1} {u : finset ι} {A : ι → 𝕜 → F} {A' : ι → F} (h : ∀ (i : ι), i ∈ u → has_strict_deriv_at (A i) (A' i) x) :
has_strict_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), ∑ (i : ι) in u, A i y) (∑ (i : ι) in u, A' i) x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.sum {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {ι : Type u_1} {u : finset ι} {A : ι → 𝕜 → F} {A' : ι → F} (h : ∀ (i : ι), i ∈ u → has_deriv_within_at (A i) (A' i) s x) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (y : 𝕜), ∑ (i : ι) in u, A i y) (∑ (i : ι) in u, A' i) s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.sum {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {ι : Type u_1} {u : finset ι} {A : ι → 𝕜 → F} {A' : ι → F} (h : ∀ (i : ι), i ∈ u → has_deriv_at (A i) (A' i) x) :
has_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), ∑ (i : ι) in u, A i y) (∑ (i : ι) in u, A' i) x
source
theorem deriv_within_sum {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {ι : Type u_1} {u : finset ι} {A : ι → 𝕜 → F} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (h : ∀ (i : ι), i ∈ u → differentiable_within_at 𝕜 (A i) s x) :
deriv_within (λ (y : 𝕜), ∑ (i : ι) in u, A i y) s x = ∑ (i : ι) in u, deriv_within (A i) s x
source
@[simp]
theorem deriv_sum {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {ι : Type u_1} {u : finset ι} {A : ι → 𝕜 → F} (h : ∀ (i : ι), i ∈ u → differentiable_at 𝕜 (A i) x) :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), ∑ (i : ι) in u, A i y) x = ∑ (i : ι) in u, deriv (A i) x

Derivatives of functions f : 𝕜 → Π i, E i #

source
@[simp]
theorem has_strict_deriv_at_pi {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {ι : Type u_1} [fintype ι] {E' : ι → Type u_2} [Π (i : ι), normed_group (E' i)] [Π (i : ι), normed_space 𝕜 (E' i)] {φ : 𝕜 → Π (i : ι), E' i} {φ' : Π (i : ι), E' i} :
has_strict_deriv_at φ φ' x ↔ ∀ (i : ι), has_strict_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), φ x i) (φ' i) x
source
@[simp]
theorem has_deriv_at_filter_pi {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} {ι : Type u_1} [fintype ι] {E' : ι → Type u_2} [Π (i : ι), normed_group (E' i)] [Π (i : ι), normed_space 𝕜 (E' i)] {φ : 𝕜 → Π (i : ι), E' i} {φ' : Π (i : ι), E' i} :
has_deriv_at_filter φ φ' x L ↔ ∀ (i : ι), has_deriv_at_filter (λ (x : 𝕜), φ x i) (φ' i) x L
source
theorem has_deriv_at_pi {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {ι : Type u_1} [fintype ι] {E' : ι → Type u_2} [Π (i : ι), normed_group (E' i)] [Π (i : ι), normed_space 𝕜 (E' i)] {φ : 𝕜 → Π (i : ι), E' i} {φ' : Π (i : ι), E' i} :
has_deriv_at φ φ' x ↔ ∀ (i : ι), has_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), φ x i) (φ' i) x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at_pi {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {ι : Type u_1} [fintype ι] {E' : ι → Type u_2} [Π (i : ι), normed_group (E' i)] [Π (i : ι), normed_space 𝕜 (E' i)] {φ : 𝕜 → Π (i : ι), E' i} {φ' : Π (i : ι), E' i} :
has_deriv_within_at φ φ' s x ↔ ∀ (i : ι), has_deriv_within_at (λ (x : 𝕜), φ x i) (φ' i) s x
source
theorem deriv_within_pi {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {ι : Type u_1} [fintype ι] {E' : ι → Type u_2} [Π (i : ι), normed_group (E' i)] [Π (i : ι), normed_space 𝕜 (E' i)] {φ : 𝕜 → Π (i : ι), E' i} (h : ∀ (i : ι), differentiable_within_at 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), φ x i) s x) (hs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within φ s x = λ (i : ι), deriv_within (λ (x : 𝕜), φ x i) s x
source
theorem deriv_pi {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {ι : Type u_1} [fintype ι] {E' : ι → Type u_2} [Π (i : ι), normed_group (E' i)] [Π (i : ι), normed_space 𝕜 (E' i)] {φ : 𝕜 → Π (i : ι), E' i} (h : ∀ (i : ι), differentiable_at 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), φ x i) x) :
deriv φ x = λ (i : ι), deriv (λ (x : 𝕜), φ x i) x

Derivative of the multiplication of a scalar function and a vector function #

source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.smul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' : 𝕜} (hc : has_deriv_within_at c c' s x) (hf : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (y : 𝕜), c y • f y) (c x • f' + c' • f x) s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.smul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' : 𝕜} (hc : has_deriv_at c c' x) (hf : has_deriv_at f f' x) :
has_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), c y • f y) (c x • f' + c' • f x) x
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.smul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' : 𝕜} (hc : has_strict_deriv_at c c' x) (hf : has_strict_deriv_at f f' x) :
has_strict_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), c y • f y) (c x • f' + c' • f x) x
source
theorem deriv_within_smul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (hc : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 c s x) (hf : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 f s x) :
deriv_within (λ (y : 𝕜), c y • f y) s x = c x • deriv_within f s x + deriv_within c s x • f x
source
theorem deriv_smul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_at 𝕜 c x) (hf : differentiable_at 𝕜 f x) :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), c y • f y) x = c x • deriv f x + deriv c x • f x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.smul_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' : 𝕜} (hc : has_deriv_within_at c c' s x) (f : F) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (y : 𝕜), c y • f) (c' • f) s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.smul_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' : 𝕜} (hc : has_deriv_at c c' x) (f : F) :
has_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), c y • f) (c' • f) x
source
theorem deriv_within_smul_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (hc : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 c s x) (f : F) :
deriv_within (λ (y : 𝕜), c y • f) s x = deriv_within c s x • f
source
theorem deriv_smul_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {x : 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_at 𝕜 c x) (f : F) :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), c y • f) x = deriv c x • f
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.const_smul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (c : 𝕜) (hf : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (y : 𝕜), c • f y) (c • f') s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.const_smul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} (c : 𝕜) (hf : has_deriv_at f f' x) :
has_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), c • f y) (c • f') x
source
theorem deriv_within_const_smul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (c : 𝕜) (hf : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 f s x) :
deriv_within (λ (y : 𝕜), c • f y) s x = c • deriv_within f s x
source
theorem deriv_const_smul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} (c : 𝕜) (hf : differentiable_at 𝕜 f x) :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), c • f y) x = c • deriv f x

Derivative of the negative of a function #

source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.neg {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L) :
has_deriv_at_filter (λ (x : 𝕜), -f x) (-f') x L
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.neg {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (x : 𝕜), -f x) (-f') s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.neg {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_at f f' x) :
has_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), -f x) (-f') x
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.neg {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} (h : has_strict_deriv_at f f' x) :
has_strict_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), -f x) (-f') x
source
theorem deriv_within.neg {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within (λ (y : 𝕜), -f y) s x = -deriv_within f s x
source
theorem deriv.neg {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), -f y) x = -deriv f x
source
@[simp]
theorem deriv.neg' {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), -f y) = λ (x : 𝕜), -deriv f x

Derivative of the negation function (i.e has_neg.neg) #

source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter_neg {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) (L : filter 𝕜) :
has_deriv_at_filter has_neg.neg (-1) x L
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at_neg {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) (s : set 𝕜) :
has_deriv_within_at has_neg.neg (-1) s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at_neg {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) :
has_deriv_at has_neg.neg (-1) x
source
theorem has_deriv_at_neg' {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) :
has_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), -x) (-1) x
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at_neg {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) :
has_strict_deriv_at has_neg.neg (-1) x
source
theorem deriv_neg {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) :
deriv has_neg.neg x = -1
source
@[simp]
theorem deriv_neg' {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] :
deriv has_neg.neg = λ (_x : 𝕜), -1
source
@[simp]
theorem deriv_neg'' {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) :
deriv (λ (x : 𝕜), -x) x = -1
source
theorem deriv_within_neg {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) (s : set 𝕜) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within has_neg.neg s x = -1
source
theorem differentiable_neg {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] :
differentiable 𝕜 has_neg.neg
source
theorem differentiable_on_neg {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (s : set 𝕜) :
differentiable_on 𝕜 has_neg.neg s

Derivative of the difference of two functions #

source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.sub {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f g : 𝕜 → F} {f' g' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L) (hg : has_deriv_at_filter g g' x L) :
has_deriv_at_filter (λ (x : 𝕜), f x - g x) (f' - g') x L
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.sub {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f g : 𝕜 → F} {f' g' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (hg : has_deriv_within_at g g' s x) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (x : 𝕜), f x - g x) (f' - g') s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.sub {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f g : 𝕜 → F} {f' g' : F} {x : 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_at f f' x) (hg : has_deriv_at g g' x) :
has_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), f x - g x) (f' - g') x
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.sub {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f g : 𝕜 → F} {f' g' : F} {x : 𝕜} (hf : has_strict_deriv_at f f' x) (hg : has_strict_deriv_at g g' x) :
has_strict_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), f x - g x) (f' - g') x
source
theorem deriv_within_sub {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f g : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (hf : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 f s x) (hg : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 g s x) :
deriv_within (λ (y : 𝕜), f y - g y) s x = deriv_within f s x - deriv_within g s x
source
@[simp]
theorem deriv_sub {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f g : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} (hf : differentiable_at 𝕜 f x) (hg : differentiable_at 𝕜 g x) :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), f y - g y) x = deriv f x - deriv g x
source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.is_O_sub {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L) :
asymptotics.is_O (λ (x' : 𝕜), f x' - f x) (λ (x' : 𝕜), x' - x) L
source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.sub_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L) (c : F) :
has_deriv_at_filter (λ (x : 𝕜), f x - c) f' x L
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.sub_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (c : F) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (x : 𝕜), f x - c) f' s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.sub_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_at f f' x) (c : F) :
has_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), f x - c) f' x
source
theorem deriv_within_sub_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (c : F) :
deriv_within (λ (y : 𝕜), f y - c) s x = deriv_within f s x
source
theorem deriv_sub_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} (c : F) :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), f y - c) x = deriv f x
source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.const_sub {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} (c : F) (hf : has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L) :
has_deriv_at_filter (λ (x : 𝕜), c - f x) (-f') x L
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.const_sub {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (c : F) (hf : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (x : 𝕜), c - f x) (-f') s x
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.const_sub {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} (c : F) (hf : has_strict_deriv_at f f' x) :
has_strict_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), c - f x) (-f') x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.const_sub {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} (c : F) (hf : has_deriv_at f f' x) :
has_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), c - f x) (-f') x
source
theorem deriv_within_const_sub {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (c : F) :
deriv_within (λ (y : 𝕜), c - f y) s x = -deriv_within f s x
source
theorem deriv_const_sub {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {x : 𝕜} (c : F) :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), c - f y) x = -deriv f x

Continuity of a function admitting a derivative #

source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.tendsto_nhds {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} (hL : L ≤ 𝓝 x) (h : has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L) :
filter.tendsto f L (𝓝 (f x))
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.continuous_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) :
continuous_within_at f s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.continuous_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_at f f' x) :
continuous_at f x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.continuous_on {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {s : set 𝕜} {f f' : 𝕜 → F} (hderiv : ∀ (x : 𝕜), x ∈ s → has_deriv_at f (f' x) x) :
continuous_on f s

Derivative of the cartesian product of two functions #

source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.prod {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f₁ : 𝕜 → F} {f₁' : F} {x : 𝕜} {L : filter 𝕜} {G : Type w} [normed_group G] [normed_space 𝕜 G] {f₂ : 𝕜 → G} {f₂' : G} (hf₁ : has_deriv_at_filter f₁ f₁' x L) (hf₂ : has_deriv_at_filter f₂ f₂' x L) :
has_deriv_at_filter (λ (x : 𝕜), (f₁ x, f₂ x)) (f₁', f₂') x L
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.prod {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f₁ : 𝕜 → F} {f₁' : F} {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {G : Type w} [normed_group G] [normed_space 𝕜 G] {f₂ : 𝕜 → G} {f₂' : G} (hf₁ : has_deriv_within_at f₁ f₁' s x) (hf₂ : has_deriv_within_at f₂ f₂' s x) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (x : 𝕜), (f₁ x, f₂ x)) (f₁', f₂') s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.prod {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f₁ : 𝕜 → F} {f₁' : F} {x : 𝕜} {G : Type w} [normed_group G] [normed_space 𝕜 G] {f₂ : 𝕜 → G} {f₂' : G} (hf₁ : has_deriv_at f₁ f₁' x) (hf₂ : has_deriv_at f₂ f₂' x) :
has_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), (f₁ x, f₂ x)) (f₁', f₂') x

Derivative of the composition of a vector function and a scalar function #

We use scomp in lemmas on composition of vector valued and scalar valued functions, and comp in lemmas on composition of scalar valued functions, in analogy for smul and mul (and also because the comp version with the shorter name will show up much more often in applications). The formula for the derivative involves smul in scomp lemmas, which can be reduced to usual multiplication in comp lemmas.

source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.scomp {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {g : 𝕜 → F} {g' : F} (x : 𝕜) {L : filter 𝕜} {h : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h' : 𝕜} (hg : has_deriv_at_filter g g' (h x) (filter.map h L)) (hh : has_deriv_at_filter h h' x L) :
has_deriv_at_filter (g ∘ h) (h' • g') x L
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.scomp {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {g : 𝕜 → F} {g' : F} (x : 𝕜) {s : set 𝕜} {h : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h' : 𝕜} {t : set 𝕜} (hg : has_deriv_within_at g g' t (h x)) (hh : has_deriv_within_at h h' s x) (hst : s ⊆ h ⁻¹' t) :
has_deriv_within_at (g ∘ h) (h' • g') s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.scomp {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {g : 𝕜 → F} {g' : F} (x : 𝕜) {h : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h' : 𝕜} (hg : has_deriv_at g g' (h x)) (hh : has_deriv_at h h' x) :
has_deriv_at (g ∘ h) (h' • g') x

The chain rule.

source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.scomp {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {g : 𝕜 → F} {g' : F} (x : 𝕜) {h : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h' : 𝕜} (hg : has_strict_deriv_at g g' (h x)) (hh : has_strict_deriv_at h h' x) :
has_strict_deriv_at (g ∘ h) (h' • g') x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.scomp_has_deriv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {g : 𝕜 → F} {g' : F} (x : 𝕜) {s : set 𝕜} {h : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h' : 𝕜} (hg : has_deriv_at g g' (h x)) (hh : has_deriv_within_at h h' s x) :
has_deriv_within_at (g ∘ h) (h' • g') s x
source
theorem deriv_within.scomp {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {g : 𝕜 → F} (x : 𝕜) {s t : set 𝕜} {h : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hg : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 g t (h x)) (hh : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 h s x) (hs : s ⊆ h ⁻¹' t) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within (g ∘ h) s x = deriv_within h s x • deriv_within g t (h x)
source
theorem deriv.scomp {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {g : 𝕜 → F} (x : 𝕜) {h : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hg : differentiable_at 𝕜 g (h x)) (hh : differentiable_at 𝕜 h x) :
deriv (g ∘ h) x = deriv h x • deriv g (h x)

Derivative of the composition of a scalar and vector functions #

source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.comp_has_fderiv_at_filter {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {E : Type w} [normed_group E] [normed_space 𝕜 E] {h₁ : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h₁' : 𝕜} {f : E → 𝕜} {f' : E →L[𝕜] 𝕜} (x : E) {L : filter E} (hh₁ : has_deriv_at_filter h₁ h₁' (f x) (filter.map f L)) (hf : has_fderiv_at_filter f f' x L) :
has_fderiv_at_filter (h₁ ∘ f) (h₁' • f') x L
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.comp_has_strict_fderiv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {E : Type w} [normed_group E] [normed_space 𝕜 E] {h₁ : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h₁' : 𝕜} {f : E → 𝕜} {f' : E →L[𝕜] 𝕜} (x : E) (hh₁ : has_strict_deriv_at h₁ h₁' (f x)) (hf : has_strict_fderiv_at f f' x) :
has_strict_fderiv_at (h₁ ∘ f) (h₁' • f') x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.comp_has_fderiv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {E : Type w} [normed_group E] [normed_space 𝕜 E] {h₁ : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h₁' : 𝕜} {f : E → 𝕜} {f' : E →L[𝕜] 𝕜} (x : E) (hh₁ : has_deriv_at h₁ h₁' (f x)) (hf : has_fderiv_at f f' x) :
has_fderiv_at (h₁ ∘ f) (h₁' • f') x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.comp_has_fderiv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {E : Type w} [normed_group E] [normed_space 𝕜 E] {h₁ : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h₁' : 𝕜} {f : E → 𝕜} {f' : E →L[𝕜] 𝕜} {s : set E} (x : E) (hh₁ : has_deriv_at h₁ h₁' (f x)) (hf : has_fderiv_within_at f f' s x) :
has_fderiv_within_at (h₁ ∘ f) (h₁' • f') s x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.comp_has_fderiv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {E : Type w} [normed_group E] [normed_space 𝕜 E] {h₁ : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h₁' : 𝕜} {f : E → 𝕜} {f' : E →L[𝕜] 𝕜} {s : set E} {t : set 𝕜} (x : E) (hh₁ : has_deriv_within_at h₁ h₁' t (f x)) (hf : has_fderiv_within_at f f' s x) (hst : set.maps_to f s t) :
has_fderiv_within_at (h₁ ∘ f) (h₁' • f') s x

Derivative of the composition of two scalar functions #

source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.comp {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) {L : filter 𝕜} {h₁ h₂ : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h₁' h₂' : 𝕜} (hh₁ : has_deriv_at_filter h₁ h₁' (h₂ x) (filter.map h₂ L)) (hh₂ : has_deriv_at_filter h₂ h₂' x L) :
has_deriv_at_filter (h₁ ∘ h₂) (h₁' * h₂') x L
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.comp {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) {s : set 𝕜} {h₁ h₂ : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h₁' h₂' : 𝕜} {t : set 𝕜} (hh₁ : has_deriv_within_at h₁ h₁' t (h₂ x)) (hh₂ : has_deriv_within_at h₂ h₂' s x) (hst : s ⊆ h₂ ⁻¹' t) :
has_deriv_within_at (h₁ ∘ h₂) (h₁' * h₂') s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.comp {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) {h₁ h₂ : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h₁' h₂' : 𝕜} (hh₁ : has_deriv_at h₁ h₁' (h₂ x)) (hh₂ : has_deriv_at h₂ h₂' x) :
has_deriv_at (h₁ ∘ h₂) (h₁' * h₂') x

The chain rule.

source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.comp {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) {h₁ h₂ : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h₁' h₂' : 𝕜} (hh₁ : has_strict_deriv_at h₁ h₁' (h₂ x)) (hh₂ : has_strict_deriv_at h₂ h₂' x) :
has_strict_deriv_at (h₁ ∘ h₂) (h₁' * h₂') x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.comp_has_deriv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) {s : set 𝕜} {h₁ h₂ : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {h₁' h₂' : 𝕜} (hh₁ : has_deriv_at h₁ h₁' (h₂ x)) (hh₂ : has_deriv_within_at h₂ h₂' s x) :
has_deriv_within_at (h₁ ∘ h₂) (h₁' * h₂') s x
source
theorem deriv_within.comp {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) {s t : set 𝕜} {h₁ h₂ : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hh₁ : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 h₁ t (h₂ x)) (hh₂ : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 h₂ s x) (hs : s ⊆ h₂ ⁻¹' t) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within (h₁ ∘ h₂) s x = (deriv_within h₁ t (h₂ x)) * deriv_within h₂ s x
source
theorem deriv.comp {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) {h₁ h₂ : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hh₁ : differentiable_at 𝕜 h₁ (h₂ x)) (hh₂ : differentiable_at 𝕜 h₂ x) :
deriv (h₁ ∘ h₂) x = (deriv h₁ (h₂ x)) * deriv h₂ x
source
theorem has_deriv_at_filter.iterate {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) {L : filter 𝕜} {f : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {f' : 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_at_filter f f' x L) (hL : filter.tendsto f L L) (hx : f x = x) (n : ℕ) :
has_deriv_at_filter f^[n] (f' ^ n) x L
source
theorem has_deriv_at.iterate {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) {f : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {f' : 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_at f f' x) (hx : f x = x) (n : ℕ) :
has_deriv_at f^[n] (f' ^ n) x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.iterate {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) {s : set 𝕜} {f : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {f' : 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (hx : f x = x) (hs : set.maps_to f s s) (n : ℕ) :
has_deriv_within_at f^[n] (f' ^ n) s x
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.iterate {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (x : 𝕜) {f : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {f' : 𝕜} (hf : has_strict_deriv_at f f' x) (hx : f x = x) (n : ℕ) :
has_strict_deriv_at f^[n] (f' ^ n) x

Derivative of the composition of a function between vector spaces and a function on 𝕜 #

source
theorem has_fderiv_within_at.comp_has_deriv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {E : Type w} [normed_group E] [normed_space 𝕜 E] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} (x : 𝕜) {s : set 𝕜} {l : F → E} {l' : F →L[𝕜] E} {t : set F} (hl : has_fderiv_within_at l l' t (f x)) (hf : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) (hst : s ⊆ f ⁻¹' t) :
has_deriv_within_at (l ∘ f) (⇑l' f') s x

The composition l ∘ f where l : F → E and f : 𝕜 → F, has a derivative within a set equal to the Fréchet derivative of l applied to the derivative of f.

source
theorem has_fderiv_at.comp_has_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {E : Type w} [normed_group E] [normed_space 𝕜 E] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} (x : 𝕜) {l : F → E} {l' : F →L[𝕜] E} (hl : has_fderiv_at l l' (f x)) (hf : has_deriv_at f f' x) :
has_deriv_at (l ∘ f) (⇑l' f') x

The composition l ∘ f where l : F → E and f : 𝕜 → F, has a derivative equal to the Fréchet derivative of l applied to the derivative of f.

source
theorem has_fderiv_at.comp_has_deriv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {E : Type w} [normed_group E] [normed_space 𝕜 E] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} (x : 𝕜) {s : set 𝕜} {l : F → E} {l' : F →L[𝕜] E} (hl : has_fderiv_at l l' (f x)) (hf : has_deriv_within_at f f' s x) :
has_deriv_within_at (l ∘ f) (⇑l' f') s x
source
theorem fderiv_within.comp_deriv_within {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {E : Type w} [normed_group E] [normed_space 𝕜 E] {f : 𝕜 → F} (x : 𝕜) {s : set 𝕜} {l : F → E} {t : set F} (hl : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 l t (f x)) (hf : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 f s x) (hs : s ⊆ f ⁻¹' t) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within (l ∘ f) s x = ⇑(fderiv_within 𝕜 l t (f x)) (deriv_within f s x)
source
theorem fderiv.comp_deriv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {E : Type w} [normed_group E] [normed_space 𝕜 E] {f : 𝕜 → F} (x : 𝕜) {l : F → E} (hl : differentiable_at 𝕜 l (f x)) (hf : differentiable_at 𝕜 f x) :
deriv (l ∘ f) x = ⇑(fderiv 𝕜 l (f x)) (deriv f x)

Derivative of the multiplication of two scalar functions #

source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.mul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' d' : 𝕜} (hc : has_deriv_within_at c c' s x) (hd : has_deriv_within_at d d' s x) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (y : 𝕜), (c y) * d y) (c' * d x + (c x) * d') s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.mul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' d' : 𝕜} (hc : has_deriv_at c c' x) (hd : has_deriv_at d d' x) :
has_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), (c y) * d y) (c' * d x + (c x) * d') x
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.mul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' d' : 𝕜} (hc : has_strict_deriv_at c c' x) (hd : has_strict_deriv_at d d' x) :
has_strict_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), (c y) * d y) (c' * d x + (c x) * d') x
source
theorem deriv_within_mul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (hc : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 c s x) (hd : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 d s x) :
deriv_within (λ (y : 𝕜), (c y) * d y) s x = (deriv_within c s x) * d x + (c x) * deriv_within d s x
source
@[simp]
theorem deriv_mul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_at 𝕜 c x) (hd : differentiable_at 𝕜 d x) :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), (c y) * d y) x = (deriv c x) * d x + (c x) * deriv d x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.mul_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' : 𝕜} (hc : has_deriv_within_at c c' s x) (d : 𝕜) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (y : 𝕜), (c y) * d) (c' * d) s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.mul_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' : 𝕜} (hc : has_deriv_at c c' x) (d : 𝕜) :
has_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), (c y) * d) (c' * d) x
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.mul_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' : 𝕜} (hc : has_strict_deriv_at c c' x) (d : 𝕜) :
has_strict_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), (c y) * d) (c' * d) x
source
theorem deriv_within_mul_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (hc : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 c s x) (d : 𝕜) :
deriv_within (λ (y : 𝕜), (c y) * d) s x = (deriv_within c s x) * d
source
theorem deriv_mul_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_at 𝕜 c x) (d : 𝕜) :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), (c y) * d) x = (deriv c x) * d
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.const_mul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {d' : 𝕜} (c : 𝕜) (hd : has_deriv_within_at d d' s x) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (y : 𝕜), c * d y) (c * d') s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.const_mul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {d' : 𝕜} (c : 𝕜) (hd : has_deriv_at d d' x) :
has_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), c * d y) (c * d') x
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.const_mul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {d' : 𝕜} (c : 𝕜) (hd : has_strict_deriv_at d d' x) :
has_strict_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), c * d y) (c * d') x
source
theorem deriv_within_const_mul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) (c : 𝕜) (hd : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 d s x) :
deriv_within (λ (y : 𝕜), c * d y) s x = c * deriv_within d s x
source
theorem deriv_const_mul {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (c : 𝕜) (hd : differentiable_at 𝕜 d x) :
deriv (λ (y : 𝕜), c * d y) x = c * deriv d x

Derivative of x ↦ x⁻¹ #

source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at_inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} (hx : x ≠ 0) :
has_strict_deriv_at has_inv.inv (-(x ^ 2)⁻¹) x
source
theorem has_deriv_at_inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} (x_ne_zero : x ≠ 0) :
has_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), y⁻¹) (-(x ^ 2)⁻¹) x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at_inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} (x_ne_zero : x ≠ 0) (s : set 𝕜) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (x : 𝕜), x⁻¹) (-(x ^ 2)⁻¹) s x
source
theorem differentiable_at_inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} (x_ne_zero : x ≠ 0) :
differentiable_at 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), x⁻¹) x
source
theorem differentiable_within_at_inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (x_ne_zero : x ≠ 0) :
differentiable_within_at 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), x⁻¹) s x
source
theorem differentiable_on_inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] :
differentiable_on 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), x⁻¹) {x : 𝕜 | x ≠ 0}
source
theorem deriv_inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} (x_ne_zero : x ≠ 0) :
deriv (λ (x : 𝕜), x⁻¹) x = -(x ^ 2)⁻¹
source
theorem deriv_within_inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (x_ne_zero : x ≠ 0) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within (λ (x : 𝕜), x⁻¹) s x = -(x ^ 2)⁻¹
source
theorem has_fderiv_at_inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} (x_ne_zero : x ≠ 0) :
has_fderiv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), x⁻¹) (1.smul_right (-(x ^ 2)⁻¹)) x
source
theorem has_fderiv_within_at_inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (x_ne_zero : x ≠ 0) :
has_fderiv_within_at (λ (x : 𝕜), x⁻¹) (1.smul_right (-(x ^ 2)⁻¹)) s x
source
theorem fderiv_inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} (x_ne_zero : x ≠ 0) :
fderiv 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), x⁻¹) x = 1.smul_right (-(x ^ 2)⁻¹)
source
theorem fderiv_within_inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (x_ne_zero : x ≠ 0) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
fderiv_within 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), x⁻¹) s x = 1.smul_right (-(x ^ 2)⁻¹)
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' : 𝕜} (hc : has_deriv_within_at c c' s x) (hx : c x ≠ 0) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (y : 𝕜), (c y)⁻¹) (-c' / c x ^ 2) s x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' : 𝕜} (hc : has_deriv_at c c' x) (hx : c x ≠ 0) :
has_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), (c y)⁻¹) (-c' / c x ^ 2) x
source
theorem differentiable_within_at.inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 c s x) (hx : c x ≠ 0) :
differentiable_within_at 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), (c x)⁻¹) s x
source
@[simp]
theorem differentiable_at.inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_at 𝕜 c x) (hx : c x ≠ 0) :
differentiable_at 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), (c x)⁻¹) x
source
theorem differentiable_on.inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {s : set 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_on 𝕜 c s) (hx : ∀ (x : 𝕜), x ∈ s → c x ≠ 0) :
differentiable_on 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), (c x)⁻¹) s
source
@[simp]
theorem differentiable.inv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable 𝕜 c) (hx : ∀ (x : 𝕜), c x ≠ 0) :
differentiable 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), (c x)⁻¹)
source
theorem deriv_within_inv' {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 c s x) (hx : c x ≠ 0) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within (λ (x : 𝕜), (c x)⁻¹) s x = -deriv_within c s x / c x ^ 2
source
@[simp]
theorem deriv_inv' {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_at 𝕜 c x) (hx : c x ≠ 0) :
deriv (λ (x : 𝕜), (c x)⁻¹) x = -deriv c x / c x ^ 2

Derivative of x ↦ c x / d x #

source
theorem has_deriv_within_at.div {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' d' : 𝕜} (hc : has_deriv_within_at c c' s x) (hd : has_deriv_within_at d d' s x) (hx : d x ≠ 0) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (y : 𝕜), c y / d y) ((c' * d x - (c x) * d') / d x ^ 2) s x
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.div {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' d' : 𝕜} (hc : has_strict_deriv_at c c' x) (hd : has_strict_deriv_at d d' x) (hx : d x ≠ 0) :
has_strict_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), c y / d y) ((c' * d x - (c x) * d') / d x ^ 2) x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.div {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {c' d' : 𝕜} (hc : has_deriv_at c c' x) (hd : has_deriv_at d d' x) (hx : d x ≠ 0) :
has_deriv_at (λ (y : 𝕜), c y / d y) ((c' * d x - (c x) * d') / d x ^ 2) x
source
theorem differentiable_within_at.div {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 c s x) (hd : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 d s x) (hx : d x ≠ 0) :
differentiable_within_at 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), c x / d x) s x
source
@[simp]
theorem differentiable_at.div {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_at 𝕜 c x) (hd : differentiable_at 𝕜 d x) (hx : d x ≠ 0) :
differentiable_at 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), c x / d x) x
source
theorem differentiable_on.div {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {s : set 𝕜} {c d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_on 𝕜 c s) (hd : differentiable_on 𝕜 d s) (hx : ∀ (x : 𝕜), x ∈ s → d x ≠ 0) :
differentiable_on 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), c x / d x) s
source
@[simp]
theorem differentiable.div {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {c d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable 𝕜 c) (hd : differentiable 𝕜 d) (hx : ∀ (x : 𝕜), d x ≠ 0) :
differentiable 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), c x / d x)
source
theorem deriv_within_div {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 c s x) (hd : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 d s x) (hx : d x ≠ 0) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within (λ (x : 𝕜), c x / d x) s x = ((deriv_within c s x) * d x - (c x) * deriv_within d s x) / d x ^ 2
source
@[simp]
theorem deriv_div {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c d : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_at 𝕜 c x) (hd : differentiable_at 𝕜 d x) (hx : d x ≠ 0) :
deriv (λ (x : 𝕜), c x / d x) x = ((deriv c x) * d x - (c x) * deriv d x) / d x ^ 2
source
theorem differentiable_within_at.div_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 c s x) {d : 𝕜} :
differentiable_within_at 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), c x / d) s x
source
@[simp]
theorem differentiable_at.div_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_at 𝕜 c x) {d : 𝕜} :
differentiable_at 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), c x / d) x
source
theorem differentiable_on.div_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {s : set 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_on 𝕜 c s) {d : 𝕜} :
differentiable_on 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), c x / d) s
source
@[simp]
theorem differentiable.div_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable 𝕜 c) {d : 𝕜} :
differentiable 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), c x / d)
source
theorem deriv_within_div_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_within_at 𝕜 c s x) {d : 𝕜} (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within (λ (x : 𝕜), c x / d) s x = deriv_within c s x / d
source
@[simp]
theorem deriv_div_const {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {c : 𝕜 → 𝕜} (hc : differentiable_at 𝕜 c x) {d : 𝕜} :
deriv (λ (x : 𝕜), c x / d) x = deriv c x / d
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.has_strict_fderiv_at_equiv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {f : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {f' x : 𝕜} (hf : has_strict_deriv_at f f' x) (hf' : f' ≠ 0) :
has_strict_fderiv_at f ↑(⇑(continuous_linear_equiv.units_equiv_aut 𝕜) (units.mk0 f' hf')) x
source
theorem has_deriv_at.has_fderiv_at_equiv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {f : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {f' x : 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_at f f' x) (hf' : f' ≠ 0) :
has_fderiv_at f ↑(⇑(continuous_linear_equiv.units_equiv_aut 𝕜) (units.mk0 f' hf')) x
source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at.of_local_left_inverse {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {f g : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {f' a : 𝕜} (hg : continuous_at g a) (hf : has_strict_deriv_at f f' (g a)) (hf' : f' ≠ 0) (hfg : ∀ᶠ (y : 𝕜) in 𝓝 a, f (g y) = y) :
has_strict_deriv_at g f'⁻¹ a

If f (g y) = y for y in some neighborhood of a, g is continuous at a, and f has an invertible derivative f' at g a in the strict sense, then g has the derivative f'⁻¹ at a in the strict sense.

This is one of the easy parts of the inverse function theorem: it assumes that we already have an inverse function.

source
theorem local_homeomorph.has_strict_deriv_at_symm {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (f : local_homeomorph 𝕜 𝕜) {a f' : 𝕜} (ha : a ∈ f.to_local_equiv.target) (hf' : f' ≠ 0) (htff' : has_strict_deriv_at ⇑f f' (⇑(f.symm) a)) :
has_strict_deriv_at ⇑(f.symm) f'⁻¹ a

If f is a local homeomorphism defined on a neighbourhood of f.symm a, and f has a nonzero derivative f' at f.symm a in the strict sense, then f.symm has the derivative f'⁻¹ at a in the strict sense.

This is one of the easy parts of the inverse function theorem: it assumes that we already have an inverse function.

source
theorem has_deriv_at.of_local_left_inverse {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {f g : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {f' a : 𝕜} (hg : continuous_at g a) (hf : has_deriv_at f f' (g a)) (hf' : f' ≠ 0) (hfg : ∀ᶠ (y : 𝕜) in 𝓝 a, f (g y) = y) :
has_deriv_at g f'⁻¹ a

If f (g y) = y for y in some neighborhood of a, g is continuous at a, and f has an invertible derivative f' at g a, then g has the derivative f'⁻¹ at a.

This is one of the easy parts of the inverse function theorem: it assumes that we already have an inverse function.

source
theorem local_homeomorph.has_deriv_at_symm {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (f : local_homeomorph 𝕜 𝕜) {a f' : 𝕜} (ha : a ∈ f.to_local_equiv.target) (hf' : f' ≠ 0) (htff' : has_deriv_at ⇑f f' (⇑(f.symm) a)) :
has_deriv_at ⇑(f.symm) f'⁻¹ a

If f is a local homeomorphism defined on a neighbourhood of f.symm a, and f has an nonzero derivative f' at f.symm a, then f.symm has the derivative f'⁻¹ at a.

This is one of the easy parts of the inverse function theorem: it assumes that we already have an inverse function.

source
theorem has_deriv_at.eventually_ne {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {F : Type v} [normed_group F] [normed_space 𝕜 F] {f : 𝕜 → F} {f' : F} {x : 𝕜} (h : has_deriv_at f f' x) (hf' : f' ≠ 0) :
∀ᶠ (z : 𝕜) in 𝓝[{x}ᶜ] x, f z ≠ f x
source
theorem not_differentiable_within_at_of_local_left_inverse_has_deriv_within_at_zero {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {f g : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {a : 𝕜} {s t : set 𝕜} (ha : a ∈ s) (hsu : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s a) (hf : has_deriv_within_at f 0 t (g a)) (hst : set.maps_to g s t) (hfg : f ∘ g =ᶠ[𝓝[s] a] id) :
¬differentiable_within_at 𝕜 g s a
source
theorem not_differentiable_at_of_local_left_inverse_has_deriv_at_zero {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {f g : 𝕜 → 𝕜} {a : 𝕜} (hf : has_deriv_at f 0 (g a)) (hfg : f ∘ g =ᶠ[𝓝 a] id) :
¬differentiable_at 𝕜 g a

Derivative of a polynomial #

source
theorem polynomial.has_strict_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (p : polynomial 𝕜) (x : 𝕜) :
has_strict_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), polynomial.eval x p) (polynomial.eval x (⇑polynomial.derivative p)) x

The derivative (in the analysis sense) of a polynomial p is given by p.derivative.

source
theorem polynomial.has_deriv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (p : polynomial 𝕜) (x : 𝕜) :
has_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), polynomial.eval x p) (polynomial.eval x (⇑polynomial.derivative p)) x

The derivative (in the analysis sense) of a polynomial p is given by p.derivative.

source
theorem polynomial.has_deriv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (p : polynomial 𝕜) (x : 𝕜) (s : set 𝕜) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (x : 𝕜), polynomial.eval x p) (polynomial.eval x (⇑polynomial.derivative p)) s x
source
theorem polynomial.differentiable_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} (p : polynomial 𝕜) :
differentiable_at 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), polynomial.eval x p) x
source
theorem polynomial.differentiable_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (p : polynomial 𝕜) :
differentiable_within_at 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), polynomial.eval x p) s x
source
theorem polynomial.differentiable {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (p : polynomial 𝕜) :
differentiable 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), polynomial.eval x p)
source
theorem polynomial.differentiable_on {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {s : set 𝕜} (p : polynomial 𝕜) :
differentiable_on 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), polynomial.eval x p) s
source
@[simp]
theorem polynomial.deriv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} (p : polynomial 𝕜) :
deriv (λ (x : 𝕜), polynomial.eval x p) x = polynomial.eval x (⇑polynomial.derivative p)
source
theorem polynomial.deriv_within {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (p : polynomial 𝕜) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
deriv_within (λ (x : 𝕜), polynomial.eval x p) s x = polynomial.eval x (⇑polynomial.derivative p)
source
theorem polynomial.has_fderiv_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (p : polynomial 𝕜) (x : 𝕜) :
has_fderiv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), polynomial.eval x p) (1.smul_right (polynomial.eval x (⇑polynomial.derivative p))) x
source
theorem polynomial.has_fderiv_within_at {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {s : set 𝕜} (p : polynomial 𝕜) (x : 𝕜) :
has_fderiv_within_at (λ (x : 𝕜), polynomial.eval x p) (1.smul_right (polynomial.eval x (⇑polynomial.derivative p))) s x
source
@[simp]
theorem polynomial.fderiv {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} (p : polynomial 𝕜) :
fderiv 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), polynomial.eval x p) x = 1.smul_right (polynomial.eval x (⇑polynomial.derivative p))
source
theorem polynomial.fderiv_within {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {s : set 𝕜} (p : polynomial 𝕜) (hxs : unique_diff_within_at 𝕜 s x) :
fderiv_within 𝕜 (λ (x : 𝕜), polynomial.eval x p) s x = 1.smul_right (polynomial.eval x (⇑polynomial.derivative p))

Derivative of x ↦ x^n for n : ℕ #

source
theorem has_strict_deriv_at_pow {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (n : ℕ) (x : 𝕜) :
has_strict_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), x ^ n) ((↑n) * x ^ (n - 1)) x
source
theorem has_deriv_at_pow {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (n : ℕ) (x : 𝕜) :
has_deriv_at (λ (x : 𝕜), x ^ n) ((↑n) * x ^ (n - 1)) x
source
theorem has_deriv_within_at_pow {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] (n : ℕ) (x : 𝕜) (s : set 𝕜) :
has_deriv_within_at (λ (x : 𝕜), x ^ n) ((↑n) * x ^ (n - 1)) s x
source
theorem differentiable_at_pow {𝕜 : Type u} [nondiscrete_normed_field 𝕜] {x : 𝕜} {n : ℕ} :
